scripts.all: concurrently -k -n FE,BE,RACER -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "cd racer && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn server:app --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && cd racer && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
